Insakulofidiya ta kyauta wacce kowa zai iya gyarawa.

Muƙalar mu a yau
Dutsen Zuma babban dutse ne wanda yake a Jihar Neja a kusa da babban birnin tarayyar Abuja. Dutsen yana kan babbar hanyar Abuja zuwa Kaduna daga unguwar Madalla, kuma a wasu lokutan ana kiranta da "Kofar Abuja daga Suleja". Dutsen Zuma yana da tsawo kusan. 300 metres (980 ft) sama da kewayensa
A rana irin ta yau
A wasu ranaku
  • Usman dan Fodio
  • Hijirar Annabi
  • Ranan Salla

Yau 1 ga Agusta na 2025 Ga wasu muhimman abubuwa na tarihi da suka faru a wannan rana.

  • 1291: An kafa ƙungiyar Swiss Confederation da ta zama tushen kasar Switzerland.
  • 1774: Joseph Priestley ya gano iskar oxygen a karon farko.
  • 1834: Birtaniya ta aiwatar da dokar soke bauta a duk faɗin mulkinta.
  • 1876: Colorado ta zama jihar 38 a cikin Amurka.
  • 1907: An fara sansanin Scouts na farko a tsibirin Brownsea a ƙasar Ingila.
  • 1914: Jamus ta ayyana yaki da Rasha, abin da ya haifar da Yaƙin Duniya na Farko.
  • 1944: Anne Frank ta rubuta shafi na ƙarshe a kundin rubutunta kafin a kama ta.
  • 1944: An fara juyin Warsaw (Warsaw Uprising) a Poland.
  • 1957: An kafa kungiyar tsaron sararin samaniya ta NORAD tsakanin Amurka da Kanada.
  • 1960: Dahomey (yanzu Benin) ta samu 'yancin kai daga Faransa.
  • 1966: Charles Whitman ya kashe mutane daga saman hasumiyar jami'ar Texas.
  • 1971: An gudanar da Concert for Bangladesh a New York don taimakon 'yan gudun hijira.
  • 1980: Vanuatu ta samu 'yancin kai daga Faransa da Birtaniya.
  • 1981: An fara watsa shirye-shiryen MTV a Amurka da bidiyon farko “Video Killed the Radio Star”.
  • 2001: An kaddamar da sabuwar hanyar sadarwa ta intanet a Ghana.
Ko kun san...?
Ko ka san bangarorin nan
  • Shin ko ka san Addinai
  • Shin ko ka san Al'adu
  • Shin ko ka san Ilimi
  • Birnin Benin ta kasance cibiyar masarautar Benin wadda ta yi fice da zane-zanen tagulla?
  • Kogin Neja yana zagaye siffar baka kafin ya zubo a Tekun Guinea?
  • Wakokin bori na da tasiri sosai a tarihin kiɗa da al'adun Hausawa?
  • Lagos ita ce birni mafi girma a Najeriya da kuma daya daga cikin mafi cunkoso a duniya?
  • A Chad, tafkin Chadi yana raguwa da sauri sakamakon dumamar yanayi?
  • Arewacin Najeriya na da wuraren tarihi da dama irin su Birnin Zaria da Birnin Kano?
  • Gidan Rumfa a Kano an gina shi tun karni na 15 kuma yana daya daga cikin tsofaffin fadodi a Afirka?
  • Addinin Islama ya fara shigowa Najeriya ne ta hanyar kasuwanci a Arewaci tun karni na 11?
  • Gibraaltar wuri ne mai matuƙar muhimmanci tsakanin Turai da Afirka saboda matsayinsa na hanya?
  • Mali da Songhai sun taba zama daular musulunci masu karfi a yammacin Afirka?
Kanun labarai
Shafukan da ake bukatar a ƙara inganta su
  • Kofi Annan
  • Abubakar Adam Ibrahim
  • Sam Adekugbe
  • Thomas Sankara
  • Daurama
  • Kabara
  • Patrice Lumumba
  • Maguzawa
  • Gaskiya Ta Fi Kwabo
  • Barikanchi Pidgin
  • Ajami
  • Baiko
  • Nigerian braille
  • Hausa Bakwai
  • Ambaliya a Najeriya: Ambaliya mai tsanani a jihar Adamawa ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar mutane da dama tare da rarraba dubban mutane daga gidajensu. Hukuma ta yi gargadi kan yiwuwar karin ambaliya a jihohin ciki har da Nasarawa, Neja, da Abuja.
  • Halin Tsaro a Mali: Kasar Mali na fama da karuwar hare-haren kungiyoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi. Sojojin ƙasa da ƙungiyoyin ƙasashen waje na ci gaba da fafatawa da 'yan tada kayar baya a arewacin ƙasar.
  • Rikicin Siyasa a Sudan: Rundunar RSF ta ayyana kafa sabuwar gwamnati a wasu yankuna na Sudan, lamarin da ya haifar da barazana ga ci gaban zaman lafiya da haɗin kan ƙasar.
  • Zaɓe a Kenya: Ana ci gaba da cece-kuce a ƙasar Kenya dangane da batun dage ko gabatar da zaben shugaban ƙasa a 2026 maimakon 2027. Kotun ƙoli na shirin yanke hukunci a kan batun.
  • Tashin Hankali a Burkina Faso: Jihar tsaro na ƙara tabarbarewa a Burkina Faso sakamakon ci gaba da hare-hare daga masu tayar da kayar baya da kuma buƙatar agajin jin ƙai.
  • Sake Tsugunar da Jama'a a Chadi: Gwamnatin Chadi na shirin sake tsara tsarin siyasa bayan rasuwar shugaban ƙasa, tare da kiraye-kirayen kafa sabuwar gwamnati ta farar hula.
  • Ci gaba da Yunwa a Sudan: Rahotanni daga yankin Dafur sun bayyana yadda yara da dama ke mutuwa sakamakon yunwa da rashin kulawa, lamarin da ke kara muni.
  • Taron Tattalin Arziki a Afirka ta Kudu: Gwamnatin Afirka ta Kudu na gudanar da babban taro na tattalin arziki domin magance rashin aikin yi da farfaɗo da masana’antu.
  • Zanga-zangar Malamai a Ghana: A cikin ƙasar Ghana, malamai da dalibai sun gudanar da zanga-zanga kan halin da ake ciki a sashen ilimi da rashin kayan aiki masu inganci.
  • Sabon Tsarin Muhalli a Tanzania: Gwamnatin Tanzania ta fara aiwatar da sabbin shirye-shirye na kare muhalli da yaki da sare itatuwa tare da bunkasa hanyoyin rayuwa masu ɗorewa.
Zaka iya duba babban shafin English Wikipedia

      • Usman dan Fodio
      • Hijirar Annabi
      • Ranan Salla

      Yau 1 ga Agusta na 2025 Ga wasu muhimman abubuwa na tarihi da suka faru a wannan rana.

      • 1291: An kafa ƙungiyar Swiss Confederation da ta zama tushen kasar Switzerland.
      • 1774: Joseph Priestley ya gano iskar oxygen a karon farko.
      • 1834: Birtaniya ta aiwatar da dokar soke bauta a duk faɗin mulkinta.
      • 1876: Colorado ta zama jihar 38 a cikin Amurka.
      • 1907: An fara sansanin Scouts na farko a tsibirin Brownsea a ƙasar Ingila.
      • 1914: Jamus ta ayyana yaki da Rasha, abin da ya haifar da Yaƙin Duniya na Farko.
      • 1944: Anne Frank ta rubuta shafi na ƙarshe a kundin rubutunta kafin a kama ta.
      • 1944: An fara juyin Warsaw (Warsaw Uprising) a Poland.
      • 1957: An kafa kungiyar tsaron sararin samaniya ta NORAD tsakanin Amurka da Kanada.
      • 1960: Dahomey (yanzu Benin) ta samu 'yancin kai daga Faransa.
      • 1966: Charles Whitman ya kashe mutane daga saman hasumiyar jami'ar Texas.
      • 1971: An gudanar da Concert for Bangladesh a New York don taimakon 'yan gudun hijira.
      • 1980: Vanuatu ta samu 'yancin kai daga Faransa da Birtaniya.
      • 1981: An fara watsa shirye-shiryen MTV a Amurka da bidiyon farko “Video Killed the Radio Star”.
      • 2001: An kaddamar da sabuwar hanyar sadarwa ta intanet a Ghana.
      Ko kun san...?
      Ko ka san bangarorin nan
      • Shin ko ka san Addinai
      • Shin ko ka san Al'adu
      • Shin ko ka san Ilimi
      • Birnin Benin ta kasance cibiyar masarautar Benin wadda ta yi fice da zane-zanen tagulla?
      • Kogin Neja yana zagaye siffar baka kafin ya zubo a Tekun Guinea?
      • Wakokin bori na da tasiri sosai a tarihin kiɗa da al'adun Hausawa?
      • Lagos ita ce birni mafi girma a Najeriya da kuma daya daga cikin mafi cunkoso a duniya?
      • A Chad, tafkin Chadi yana raguwa da sauri sakamakon dumamar yanayi?
      • Arewacin Najeriya na da wuraren tarihi da dama irin su Birnin Zaria da Birnin Kano?
      • Gidan Rumfa a Kano an gina shi tun karni na 15 kuma yana daya daga cikin tsofaffin fadodi a Afirka?
      • Addinin Islama ya fara shigowa Najeriya ne ta hanyar kasuwanci a Arewaci tun karni na 11?
      • Gibraaltar wuri ne mai matuƙar muhimmanci tsakanin Turai da Afirka saboda matsayinsa na hanya?
      • Mali da Songhai sun taba zama daular musulunci masu karfi a yammacin Afirka?
      Kanun labarai
      Shafukan da ake bukatar a ƙara inganta su
      • Kofi Annan
      • Abubakar Adam Ibrahim
      • Sam Adekugbe
      • Thomas Sankara
      • Daurama
      • Kabara
      • Patrice Lumumba
      • Maguzawa
      • Gaskiya Ta Fi Kwabo
      • Barikanchi Pidgin
      • Ajami
      • Baiko
      • Nigerian braille
      • Hausa Bakwai
      • Ambaliya a Najeriya: Ambaliya mai tsanani a jihar Adamawa ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar mutane da dama tare da rarraba dubban mutane daga gidajensu. Hukuma ta yi gargadi kan yiwuwar karin ambaliya a jihohin ciki har da Nasarawa, Neja, da Abuja.
      • Halin Tsaro a Mali: Kasar Mali na fama da karuwar hare-haren kungiyoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi. Sojojin ƙasa da ƙungiyoyin ƙasashen waje na ci gaba da fafatawa da 'yan tada kayar baya a arewacin ƙasar.
      • Rikicin Siyasa a Sudan: Rundunar RSF ta ayyana kafa sabuwar gwamnati a wasu yankuna na Sudan, lamarin da ya haifar da barazana ga ci gaban zaman lafiya da haɗin kan ƙasar.
      • Zaɓe a Kenya: Ana ci gaba da cece-kuce a ƙasar Kenya dangane da batun dage ko gabatar da zaben shugaban ƙasa a 2026 maimakon 2027. Kotun ƙoli na shirin yanke hukunci a kan batun.
      • Tashin Hankali a Burkina Faso: Jihar tsaro na ƙara tabarbarewa a Burkina Faso sakamakon ci gaba da hare-hare daga masu tayar da kayar baya da kuma buƙatar agajin jin ƙai.
      • Sake Tsugunar da Jama'a a Chadi: Gwamnatin Chadi na shirin sake tsara tsarin siyasa bayan rasuwar shugaban ƙasa, tare da kiraye-kirayen kafa sabuwar gwamnati ta farar hula.
      • Ci gaba da Yunwa a Sudan: Rahotanni daga yankin Dafur sun bayyana yadda yara da dama ke mutuwa sakamakon yunwa da rashin kulawa, lamarin da ke kara muni.
      • Taron Tattalin Arziki a Afirka ta Kudu: Gwamnatin Afirka ta Kudu na gudanar da babban taro na tattalin arziki domin magance rashin aikin yi da farfaɗo da masana’antu.
      • Zanga-zangar Malamai a Ghana: A cikin ƙasar Ghana, malamai da dalibai sun gudanar da zanga-zanga kan halin da ake ciki a sashen ilimi da rashin kayan aiki masu inganci.
      • Sabon Tsarin Muhalli a Tanzania: Gwamnatin Tanzania ta fara aiwatar da sabbin shirye-shirye na kare muhalli da yaki da sare itatuwa tare da bunkasa hanyoyin rayuwa masu ɗorewa.

Dutsen Zuma babban dutse ne wanda yake a Jihar Neja a kusa da babban birnin tarayyar Abuja. Dutsen yana kan babbar hanyar Abuja zuwa Kaduna daga unguwar Madalla, kuma a wasu lokutan ana kiranta da "Kofar Abuja daga Suleja". Dutsen Zuma yana da tsawo kusan. 300 metres (980 ft) sama da kewayensa

  • Wakokin bori na da tasiri sosai a tarihin kiɗa da al'adun Hausawa?
  • Lagos ita ce birni mafi girma a Najeriya da kuma daya daga cikin mafi cunkoso a duniya?
  • A Chad, tafkin Chadi yana raguwa da sauri sakamakon dumamar yanayi?
  • Arewacin Najeriya na da wuraren tarihi da dama irin su Birnin Zaria da Birnin Kano?
  • Gidan Rumfa a Kano an gina shi tun karni na 15 kuma yana daya daga cikin tsofaffin fadodi a Afirka?
  • Addinin Islama ya fara shigowa Najeriya ne ta hanyar kasuwanci a Arewaci tun karni na 11?
  • Gibraaltar wuri ne mai matuƙar muhimmanci tsakanin Turai da Afirka saboda matsayinsa na hanya?
  • Mali da Songhai sun taba zama daular musulunci masu karfi a yammacin Afirka?
Kanun labarai
Shafukan da ake bukatar a ƙara inganta su
  • Kofi Annan
  • Abubakar Adam Ibrahim
  • Sam Adekugbe
  • Thomas Sankara
  • Daurama
  • Kabara
  • Patrice Lumumba
  • Maguzawa
  • Gaskiya Ta Fi Kwabo
  • Barikanchi Pidgin
  • Ajami
  • Baiko
  • Nigerian braille
  • Hausa Bakwai
  • Ambaliya a Najeriya: Ambaliya mai tsanani a jihar Adamawa ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar mutane da dama tare da rarraba dubban mutane daga gidajensu. Hukuma ta yi gargadi kan yiwuwar karin ambaliya a jihohin ciki har da Nasarawa, Neja, da Abuja.
  • Halin Tsaro a Mali: Kasar Mali na fama da karuwar hare-haren kungiyoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi. Sojojin ƙasa da ƙungiyoyin ƙasashen waje na ci gaba da fafatawa da 'yan tada kayar baya a arewacin ƙasar.
  • Rikicin Siyasa a Sudan: Rundunar RSF ta ayyana kafa sabuwar gwamnati a wasu yankuna na Sudan, lamarin da ya haifar da barazana ga ci gaban zaman lafiya da haɗin kan ƙasar.
  • Zaɓe a Kenya: Ana ci gaba da cece-kuce a ƙasar Kenya dangane da batun dage ko gabatar da zaben shugaban ƙasa a 2026 maimakon 2027. Kotun ƙoli na shirin yanke hukunci a kan batun.
  • Tashin Hankali a Burkina Faso: Jihar tsaro na ƙara tabarbarewa a Burkina Faso sakamakon ci gaba da hare-hare daga masu tayar da kayar baya da kuma buƙatar agajin jin ƙai.
  • Sake Tsugunar da Jama'a a Chadi: Gwamnatin Chadi na shirin sake tsara tsarin siyasa bayan rasuwar shugaban ƙasa, tare da kiraye-kirayen kafa sabuwar gwamnati ta farar hula.
  • Ci gaba da Yunwa a Sudan: Rahotanni daga yankin Dafur sun bayyana yadda yara da dama ke mutuwa sakamakon yunwa da rashin kulawa, lamarin da ke kara muni.
  • Taron Tattalin Arziki a Afirka ta Kudu: Gwamnatin Afirka ta Kudu na gudanar da babban taro na tattalin arziki domin magance rashin aikin yi da farfaɗo da masana’antu.
  • Zanga-zangar Malamai a Ghana: A cikin ƙasar Ghana, malamai da dalibai sun gudanar da zanga-zanga kan halin da ake ciki a sashen ilimi da rashin kayan aiki masu inganci.
  • Sabon Tsarin Muhalli a Tanzania: Gwamnatin Tanzania ta fara aiwatar da sabbin shirye-shirye na kare muhalli da yaki da sare itatuwa tare da bunkasa hanyoyin rayuwa masu ɗorewa.

Dutsen Zuma
Dutsen Zuma babban dutse ne wanda yake a Jihar Neja a kusa da babban birnin tarayyar  Abuja. Dutsen yana kan babbar hanyar Abuja zuwa Kaduna daga unguwar Madalla, kuma a wasu lokutan ana kiranta da "Kofar Abuja daga Suleja".  Dutsen Zuma yana da tsawo kusan. 300 metres (980 ft) sama da kewayensa

rows:
Dutsen Zuma
Dutsen Zuma babban dutse ne wanda yake a Jihar Neja a kusa da babban birnin tarayyar  Abuja. Dutsen yana kan babbar hanyar Abuja zuwa Kaduna daga unguwar Madalla, kuma a wasu lokutan ana kiranta da "Kofar Abuja daga Suleja".  Dutsen Zuma yana da tsawo kusan. 300 metres (980 ft) sama da kewayensa

A wasu ranaku
Usman dan Fodio
Hijirar Annabi
Ranan Salla
 
Yau 1 ga Agusta na 2025
Ga wasu muhimman abubuwa na tarihi da suka faru a wannan rana.

1291: An kafa ƙungiyar Swiss Confederation da ta zama tushen kasar Switzerland.
1774: Joseph Priestley ya gano iskar oxygen a karon farko.
1834: Birtaniya ta aiwatar da dokar soke bauta a duk faɗin mulkinta.
1876: Colorado ta zama jihar 38 a cikin Amurka.
1907: An fara sansanin Scouts na farko a tsibirin Brownsea a ƙasar Ingila.
1914: Jamus ta ayyana yaki da Rasha, abin da ya haifar da Yaƙin Duniya na Farko.
1944: Anne Frank ta rubuta shafi na ƙarshe a kundin rubutunta kafin a kama ta.
1944: An fara juyin Warsaw (Warsaw Uprising) a Poland.
1957: An kafa kungiyar tsaron sararin samaniya ta NORAD tsakanin Amurka da Kanada.
1960: Dahomey (yanzu Benin) ta samu 'yancin kai daga Faransa.
1966: Charles Whitman ya kashe mutane daga saman hasumiyar jami'ar Texas.
1971: An gudanar da Concert for Bangladesh a New York don taimakon 'yan gudun hijira.
1980: Vanuatu ta samu 'yancin kai daga Faransa da Birtaniya.
1981: An fara watsa shirye-shiryen MTV a Amurka da bidiyon farko “Video Killed the Radio Star”.
2001: An kaddamar da sabuwar hanyar sadarwa ta intanet a Ghana.

Dutsen Zuma yana da tsawo kusan. 300 metres (980 ft) sama da kewayensa

  * [Usman dan Fodio](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Usman_dan_Fodio "Usman dan Fodio")

**Yau 1 ga Agusta na 2025** Ga wasu muhimman abubuwa na tarihi da suka faru a wannan rana. 
  * 1291: An kafa ƙungiyar Swiss Confederation da ta zama tushen kasar **[Switzerland](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Switzerland "Switzerland")**.
  * 1774: Joseph Priestley ya gano iskar oxygen a karon farko.
  * 1834: Birtaniya ta aiwatar da dokar soke bauta a duk faɗin mulkinta.
  * 1876: **[Colorado](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colorado "Colorado")** ta zama jihar 38 a cikin **[Amurka](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amurka "Amurka")**.
  * 1907: An fara sansanin Scouts na farko a tsibirin Brownsea a ƙasar Ingila.
  * 1914: **[Jamus](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jamus "Jamus")** ta ayyana yaki da **[Rasha](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rasha "Rasha")** , abin da ya haifar da **[Yaƙin Duniya na Farko](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ya%C6%99in_Duniya_na_I "Yaƙin Duniya na I")**.
  * 1944: Anne Frank ta rubuta shafi na ƙarshe a kundin rubutunta kafin a kama ta.
  * 1944: An fara juyin Warsaw (Warsaw Uprising) a **[Poland](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Poland "Poland")**.
  * 1957: An kafa kungiyar tsaron sararin samaniya ta NORAD tsakanin Amurka da Kanada.
  * 1960: **[Dahomey](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dahomey "Dahomey")** (yanzu **[Benin](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Benin "Benin")**) ta samu 'yancin kai daga **[Faransa](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Faransa "Faransa")**.
  * 1966: Charles Whitman ya kashe mutane daga saman hasumiyar jami'ar **[Texas](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Texas "Texas")**.
  * 1971: An gudanar da Concert for Bangladesh a **[New York](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_York "New York")** don taimakon 'yan gudun hijira.
  * 1980: **[Vanuatu](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vanuatu "Vanuatu")** ta samu 'yancin kai daga **[Faransa](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Faransa "Faransa")** da **[Birtaniya](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Birtaniya "Birtaniya")**.
  * 1981: An fara watsa shirye-shiryen MTV a **[Amurka](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amurka "Amurka")** da bidiyon farko “Video Killed the Radio Star”.
  * 2001: An kaddamar da sabuwar hanyar sadarwa ta intanet a **[Ghana](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ghana "Ghana")**.

**Shafukan da ake bukatar a ƙara inganta su**  

  * [Kofi Annan](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kofi_Annan "Kofi Annan")

  * [Ajami](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ajami "Ajami")

  * [Nigerian braille](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nigerian_braille "Nigerian braille")
  * [Hausa Bakwai](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hausa_Bakwai "Hausa Bakwai")


  * **Ambaliya a Najeriya** : Ambaliya mai tsanani a jihar **[Adamawa](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Adamawa "Adamawa")** ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar mutane da dama tare da rarraba dubban mutane daga gidajensu. Hukuma ta yi gargadi kan yiwuwar karin ambaliya a jihohin ciki har da **[Nasarawa](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nasarawa "Nasarawa")** , **[Neja](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neja "Neja")** , da **[Abuja](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abuja "Abuja")**.
  * **Halin Tsaro a Mali** : Kasar **[Mali](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mali "Mali")** na fama da karuwar hare-haren kungiyoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi. Sojojin ƙasa da ƙungiyoyin ƙasashen waje na ci gaba da fafatawa da 'yan tada kayar baya a arewacin ƙasar.
  * **Rikicin Siyasa a Sudan** : Rundunar **[RSF](https://ha.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=RSF&action=edit&redlink=1 "RSF \(babu wannan shafin\)")** ta ayyana kafa sabuwar gwamnati a wasu yankuna na **[Sudan](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sudan "Sudan")** , lamarin da ya haifar da barazana ga ci gaban zaman lafiya da haɗin kan ƙasar.
  * **Zaɓe a Kenya** : Ana ci gaba da cece-kuce a ƙasar **[Kenya](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kenya "Kenya")** dangane da batun dage ko gabatar da zaben shugaban ƙasa a 2026 maimakon 2027. Kotun ƙoli na shirin yanke hukunci a kan batun.
  * **Tashin Hankali a Burkina Faso** : Jihar tsaro na ƙara tabarbarewa a **[Burkina Faso](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Burkina_Faso "Burkina Faso")** sakamakon ci gaba da hare-hare daga masu tayar da kayar baya da kuma buƙatar agajin jin ƙai.
  * **Sake Tsugunar da Jama'a a Chadi** : Gwamnatin **[Chadi](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chadi "Chadi")** na shirin sake tsara tsarin siyasa bayan rasuwar shugaban ƙasa, tare da kiraye-kirayen kafa sabuwar gwamnati ta farar hula.
  * **Ci gaba da Yunwa a Sudan** : Rahotanni daga yankin **[Dafur](https://ha.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Dafur&action=edit&redlink=1 "Dafur \(babu wannan shafin\)")** sun bayyana yadda yara da dama ke mutuwa sakamakon yunwa da rashin kulawa, lamarin da ke kara muni.
  * **Taron Tattalin Arziki a Afirka ta Kudu** : Gwamnatin **[Afirka ta Kudu](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Afirka_ta_Kudu "Afirka ta Kudu")** na gudanar da babban taro na tattalin arziki domin magance rashin aikin yi da farfaɗo da masana’antu.
  * **Zanga-zangar Malamai a Ghana** : A cikin ƙasar **[Ghana](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ghana "Ghana")** , malamai da dalibai sun gudanar da zanga-zanga kan halin da ake ciki a sashen ilimi da rashin kayan aiki masu inganci.
  * **Sabon Tsarin Muhalli a Tanzania** : Gwamnatin **[Tanzania](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tanzania "Tanzania")** ta fara aiwatar da sabbin shirye-shirye na kare muhalli da yaki da sare itatuwa tare da bunkasa hanyoyin rayuwa masu ɗorewa.

![⟨58⟩](https://ha.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fayil:Aso_rock.png)Dutsen Zuma **Dutsen Zuma⟨59⟩** babban **dutse⟨60⟩** ne wanda yake a **Jihar Neja⟨61⟩** a kusa da babban birnin tarayyar **Abuja⟨62⟩**. Dutsen yana kan babbar hanyar Abuja zuwa **Kaduna⟨63⟩ "Kaduna \(birni\)")** daga unguwar Madalla, kuma a wasu lokutan ana kiranta da "Kofar Abuja daga **Suleja⟨64⟩** ". Dutsen Zuma yana da tsawo kusan. 300 metres (980 ft) sama da kewayensa

**Yau 1 ga Agusta na 2025** Ga wasu muhimman abubuwa na tarihi da suka faru a wannan rana. 
  * 1291: An kafa ƙungiyar Swiss Confederation da ta zama tushen kasar **Switzerland⟨69⟩**.
  * 1774: Joseph Priestley ya gano iskar oxygen a karon farko.
  * 1834: Birtaniya ta aiwatar da dokar soke bauta a duk faɗin mulkinta.
  * 1876: **Colorado⟨70⟩** ta zama jihar 38 a cikin **Amurka⟨71⟩**.
  * 1907: An fara sansanin Scouts na farko a tsibirin Brownsea a ƙasar Ingila.
  * 1914: **Jamus⟨72⟩** ta ayyana yaki da **Rasha⟨73⟩** , abin da ya haifar da **Yaƙin Duniya na Farko⟨74⟩**.
  * 1944: Anne Frank ta rubuta shafi na ƙarshe a kundin rubutunta kafin a kama ta.
  * 1944: An fara juyin Warsaw (Warsaw Uprising) a **Poland⟨75⟩**.
  * 1957: An kafa kungiyar tsaron sararin samaniya ta NORAD tsakanin Amurka da Kanada.
  * 1960: **Dahomey⟨76⟩** (yanzu **Benin⟨77⟩**) ta samu 'yancin kai daga **Faransa⟨78⟩**.
  * 1966: Charles Whitman ya kashe mutane daga saman hasumiyar jami'ar **Texas⟨79⟩**.
  * 1971: An gudanar da Concert for Bangladesh a **New York⟨80⟩** don taimakon 'yan gudun hijira.
  * 1980: **Vanuatu⟨81⟩** ta samu 'yancin kai daga **Faransa⟨78⟩** da **Birtaniya⟨82⟩**.
  * 1981: An fara watsa shirye-shiryen MTV a **Amurka⟨71⟩** da bidiyon farko “Video Killed the Radio Star”.
  * 2001: An kaddamar da sabuwar hanyar sadarwa ta intanet a **Ghana⟨83⟩**.

  * **Kogin Neja⟨91⟩** yana zagaye siffar baka kafin ya zubo a Tekun Guinea?
  * **Wakokin bori** na da tasiri sosai a tarihin kiɗa da al'adun Hausawa?

  * A **Chad⟨93⟩** , tafkin Chadi yana raguwa da sauri sakamakon dumamar yanayi?
  * **Arewacin Najeriya⟨94⟩** na da wuraren tarihi da dama irin su Birnin Zaria da Birnin Kano?

  * **Ambaliya a Najeriya** : Ambaliya mai tsanani a jihar **Adamawa⟨115⟩** ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar mutane da dama tare da rarraba dubban mutane daga gidajensu. Hukuma ta yi gargadi kan yiwuwar karin ambaliya a jihohin ciki har da **Nasarawa⟨116⟩** , **Neja⟨117⟩** , da **Abuja⟨62⟩**.
  * **Halin Tsaro a Mali** : Kasar **Mali⟨99⟩** na fama da karuwar hare-haren kungiyoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi. Sojojin ƙasa da ƙungiyoyin ƙasashen waje na ci gaba da fafatawa da 'yan tada kayar baya a arewacin ƙasar.
  * **Rikicin Siyasa a Sudan** : Rundunar **RSF⟨118⟩** ta ayyana kafa sabuwar gwamnati a wasu yankuna na **Sudan⟨119⟩** , lamarin da ya haifar da barazana ga ci gaban zaman lafiya da haɗin kan ƙasar.
  * **Zaɓe a Kenya** : Ana ci gaba da cece-kuce a ƙasar **Kenya⟨120⟩** dangane da batun dage ko gabatar da zaben shugaban ƙasa a 2026 maimakon 2027. Kotun ƙoli na shirin yanke hukunci a kan batun.
  * **Tashin Hankali a Burkina Faso** : Jihar tsaro na ƙara tabarbarewa a **Burkina Faso⟨121⟩** sakamakon ci gaba da hare-hare daga masu tayar da kayar baya da kuma buƙatar agajin jin ƙai.
  * **Sake Tsugunar da Jama'a a Chadi** : Gwamnatin **Chadi⟨122⟩** na shirin sake tsara tsarin siyasa bayan rasuwar shugaban ƙasa, tare da kiraye-kirayen kafa sabuwar gwamnati ta farar hula.
  * **Ci gaba da Yunwa a Sudan** : Rahotanni daga yankin **Dafur⟨123⟩** sun bayyana yadda yara da dama ke mutuwa sakamakon yunwa da rashin kulawa, lamarin da ke kara muni.
  * **Taron Tattalin Arziki a Afirka ta Kudu** : Gwamnatin **Afirka ta Kudu⟨124⟩** na gudanar da babban taro na tattalin arziki domin magance rashin aikin yi da farfaɗo da masana’antu.
  * **Zanga-zangar Malamai a Ghana** : A cikin ƙasar **Ghana⟨83⟩** , malamai da dalibai sun gudanar da zanga-zanga kan halin da ake ciki a sashen ilimi da rashin kayan aiki masu inganci.
